summary: The `StatisticsScreen` has been updated to include a share icon in the AppBar. Tapping this icon now captures a visual PNG of the `_GlobalProgressCard` using `RepaintBoundary` and `toImage`. This image is then shared via the native share menu (`share_plus` package) along with a localized message that includes the user's progress percentage and an app store link. A new constant file `lib/core/constants/app_constants.dart` was created to hold the `appStoreLink`. Localization files (`app_en.arb` and `app_es.arb`) have been updated with new keys for the share tooltip and message, including placeholders for dynamic content.
